name: Kohl's Hot German Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Bacon, cut up and fried crisp
5 Or 6 medium cooked potatoes, diced large
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions and celery in bacon grease until tender.
2. Add sugar, flour, salt, pepper, and celery seed. Stir in water and vinegar.
3. Cook the mixture until it slightly thickens.
4. Pour the sauce into a bowl with the diced potatoes and bacon.
5. Place hot dogs on top of the potato mixture.
6. Broil for 4 inches from the heat source until desired crispiness is achieved.
